privileged_info_summary: The task creates an Odoo HR department named Quality Assurance with a QA Inspector job position and a QA Shift Schedule (Monday-Thursday, 7:00-17:30). Three employees are onboarded: Maria Chen (maria.chen@meridianmfg.com, +1 (555) 014-7200), James Okafor (james.okafor@meridianmfg.com, +1 (555) 014-7201), and Sarah Petrov (sarah.petrov@meridianmfg.com, +1 (555) 014-7202). Maria Chen is assigned as department manager and coach for James Okafor. All metadata values are synthetic test data created for the task scenario.
